title: VimFu — The z Key
description: Z is a prefix for scroll commands. Z Z centers, Z T tops, Z B bottoms. Z for zoom your view.

setup.comment: Set TERM for proper color support in Neovim
Create demo file — 40 lines so scroll commands show dramatic shifts

steps.say: Z is a prefix for scroll commands. It repositions the screen around your cursor.

steps.comment: --- Demo 1: jump deep then zz to center ---

steps.say: Jump down to the throne room on line twenty-five. It lands near the bottom of the screen.
Z Z. Centers the current line on screen.
The throne room jumped to the middle. Completely different view. The cursor stayed put. The screen moved.
Z T. Current line to the top.
Now the throne room is the first line you see. Everything above it is gone.
Z B. Current line to the bottom.
Throne room is now at the bottom. Everything below it is gone. Three totally different views, same cursor position.
Z Z to center. Z T for top. Z B for bottom. Control your viewport.
